query_normalized: assessing the sensitivity of regression coefficients to dataset subset selection statistics
rationale: This paper satisfies criterion (a) and (b) because it investigates the stability and sensitivity of regression variable selection (a core component of regression coefficient estimation) to the underlying data structure and sparsity levels, which is the fundamental mechanism governing how regression results change with dataset subset selection.
